title: Result - Belgium
content:
Welcome to Belgium, a country of diverse landscapes and cultures! Enjoy forest trails, coastal views, cycling, horseback riding and visits to theme parks, castles and estates.
Home to Flemish, French and German-speaking communities, Belgium thrives on multiculturalism and innovation. A pioneer in political and social rights, Belgium also leads in scientific fields like nanotechnology, biotechnology, vaccine research, space exploration and environmental studies.

## Unique food tradition
Gaufre de Bruxelles: a type of waffle with larger squares, deeper pockets and a lighter batter than regular waffles.
Belgium is a leader in scientific research in fields such as nanotechnology, biotechnology and vaccination research. Belgians are also heavily involved in research on space exploration and the environment.

### Local legend or myth
Kludde: a nocturnal terror that preys on children, the Kludde is said to have a furry, dog-like appearance with heavy bracelets and bear-like claws.

### Language of the Land
Belgium has 3 official languages: French, Dutch and German.
of the world’s 14 Trappist breweries are located in Belgium, where monks craft beer using traditional methods.
